title: Audio engine — functional sound toggle with actual SFX
problem: The settings screen has an audio on/off toggle but it has no effect — no audio engine is wired up and no sound files exist in the project. The toggle is purely cosmetic. A minimal audio layer (combat hits, item pickup, level-up) is needed for the toggle to be meaningful.

lineage.spawnReason: deferred feature: audio was acknowledged as a stub in the settings implementation; real SFX system is pre-release work
